prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Ford 2.3L Lima Turbo (engine code: *2300 Turbo*)** from a 1983-1986 Ford Mustang SVO, retaining the B2200's RWD layout. Utilize a **Holley Sniper EFI** standalone ECU with a **Garrett T25 turbocharger** (55-trim compressor, .48 A/R turbine housing) for 22 psi of boost, paired with a **Tial 44mm wastegate** and **TurboSmart Kompact blow-off valve**. Custom **ARP head studs** and **Fel-Pro MLS head gasket** to handle increased cylinder pressures. Upgrade the fuel system with **Walbro 450 LPH in-tank pump**, **Injector Dynamics ID1000 injectors**, and a **Mocal 19-row oil cooler** to prevent heat soak.

Full **G-Force Racing Gears T5Z 5-speed transmission** swap (from a 1993 Ford Mustang Cobra) with a **McLeod RST twin-disc clutch** and **Spec Stage 3+ flywheel**. Custom **Currie Enterprises 9-inch rear end** with **3.73:1 gears**, **Torsen limited-slip differential**, and **Moser 31-spline axles**. Upgrade the driveshaft to a **Driveshaft Shop 3.5-inch aluminum unit** with **Spicer 1350 U-joints** for durability under high torque.

Suspension overhaul with **Bilstein B16 coilovers** (custom valving for the B2200's 1,100 kg weight), **Eibach Pro-Kit springs** (1.5-inch drop), and **Energy Suspension polyurethane bushings** for all control arms. Front **Addco 1.25-inch sway bar** and rear **Hellwig 1-inch sway bar** to reduce body roll. Braking system upgrade to **Wilwood Dynalite 4-piston calipers** (front) with **12.19-inch rotors** and **Wilwood Dynapro 2-piston calipers** (rear) with **11-inch rotors**, paired with **Hawk HT-10 brake pads** and **Goodridge stainless steel brake lines**.
estetica: Full **Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit** (modified for B2200 chassis) with **custom carbon fiber fenders**, **overfenders**, and **front/rear bumpers**. **Seibon carbon fiber hood** with **functional hood scoop** (ducted to the turbo inlet) and **carbon fiber rear diffuser** from **AIT Racing**. **Work Meister S1 3P 15x9 wheels** (ET0 offset) with **Toyo R888R 225/50R15 tires** for aggressive stance and grip.

Custom **JDM-style livery** inspired by the **Mazda 787B Le Mans car**, featuring **3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap** with **fluorescent pink and green accents** (hand-painted by **Kamikaze Designs**). **LED taillights** from a **2003-2008 Mazda RX-8** (modified to fit the B2200's housings) and **Hella 500 Supertones** (clear lens) for a modern touch. **Custom aluminum bed delete** with **carbon fiber tonneau cover** (from **Extang**) and **LED bed lighting** (from **Oracle Lighting**).

Interior stripped and rebuilt with **Sparco Pro ADV seats** (fixed-back, 6-point harnesses), **Takata Drift II 4-point harnesses**, and **NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel** (with **Momo suede cover**). **Custom aluminum dashboard** (fabricated by **Cusco**) with **Defi BF gauges** (boost, oil pressure, water temp, fuel pressure) and **AEM X-Series wideband AFR gauge**. **Sound deadening** via **Kilmat 80 mil butyl sheets** and **custom roll cage** (from **Autopower Industries**) with **bolt-in X-brace** for chassis rigidity.
